name: Poppyseed Tea Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch Bundt pan.
3. In a large bowl of electric mixer, cream butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in poppy seeds.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda) with the sour cream to the butter mixture, starting and ending with dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
7. Stir in almond extract and vanilla.
8. Pour batter into prepared Bundt pan and bake for 1 hour.
